title: Alienoid
tmdbOverview: Gurus in the late Goryeo dynasty try to obtain a fabled, holy sword, and humans in 2022 hunt down an alien prisoner that is locked in a human's body. The two parties cross paths when a time-traveling portal opens up.
synopsis: Alienoid is a 2022 science fiction, action and fantasy film from South Korea. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
